name: Aspen Grove
description: Clonal colony intelligence forming the largest and oldest known organisms on Earth (Pando: 80,000 years, 6 million kg). Interconnected root networks share resources, coordinate stress responses, and enable synchronized leaf emergence across thousands of genetically identical stems. Fire adaptation sacrifices above-ground growth to protect the immortal root system, regenerating entire forests from below.

core_attributes.pattern: clonal colony coordination, root resource sharing, fire-resilient regeneration
